'''thongalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keckish|keckish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keckish|keckish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thongalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongalithi|thongalithi]] || [[word:thongaliji|thongaliji]] || [[word:thongalishi|thongalishi]] || [[word:thongaliki|thongaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongaluthuthu|thongaluthuthu]] || [[word:thongalujuju|thongalujuju]] || [[word:thongalushushu|thongalushushu]] || [[word:thongalukuku|thongalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongaluthu|thongaluthu]] || [[word:thongaluju|thongaluju]] || [[word:thongalushu|thongalushu]] || [[word:thongaluku|thongaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongalufthuf|thongalufthuf]] || [[word:thongalufjuf|thongalufjuf]] || [[word:thongalufshuf|thongalufshuf]] || [[word:thongalufkuf|thongalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongalethe|thongalethe]] || [[word:thongaleje|thongaleje]] || [[word:thongaleshe|thongaleshe]] || [[word:thongaleke|thongaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongalothotho|thongalothotho]] || [[word:thongalojojo|thongalojojo]] || [[word:thongaloshosho|thongaloshosho]] || [[word:thongalokoko|thongalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongalotho|thongalotho]] || [[word:thongalojo|thongalojo]] || [[word:thongalosho|thongalosho]] || [[word:thongaloko|thongaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongalofthof|thongalofthof]] || [[word:thongalofjof|thongalofjof]] || [[word:thongalofshof|thongalofshof]] || [[word:thongalofkof|thongalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfthĂŻf|thongalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfjĂŻf|thongalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfshĂŻf|thongalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfkĂŻf|thongalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thongalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thongalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thongalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thongalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfthĂŻf|thongalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfjĂŻf|thongalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfshĂŻf|thongalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfkĂŻf|thongalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfthĂŻf|thongalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfjĂŻf|thongalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfshĂŻf|thongalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongalĂŻfkĂŻf|thongalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongalĂŠthĂŠ|thongalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thongalĂŠjĂŠ|thongalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thongalĂŠshĂŠ|thongalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thongalĂŠkĂŠ|thongalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongalathatha|thongalathatha]] || [[word:thongalajaja|thongalajaja]] || [[word:thongalashasha|thongalashasha]] || [[word:thongalakaka|thongalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongalatha|thongalatha]] || [[word:thongalaja|thongalaja]] || [[word:thongalasha|thongalasha]] || [[word:thongalaka|thongalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongalafthaf|thongalafthaf]] || [[word:thongalafjaf|thongalafjaf]] || [[word:thongalafshaf|thongalafshaf]] || [[word:thongalafkaf|thongalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thongalasha|thongalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongalshĂ«sha|thongalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongalrosha|thongalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongalmusha|thongalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongalyasha|thongalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongalnkshĂ«sha|gothongalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongalnkrosha|gothongalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongalnkmusha|gothongalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongalnkyasha|gothongalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thongangalasha|thongangalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongangalshĂ«sha|thongangalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongangalrosha|thongangalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongangalmusha|thongangalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongangalyasha|thongangalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongangalnkshĂ«sha|gothongangalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongangalnkrosha|gothongangalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongangalnkmusha|gothongangalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongangalnkyasha|gothongangalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thengĂŠlasha|thengĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thengĂŠlshĂ«sha|thengĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thengĂŠlrosha|thengĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thengĂŠlmusha|thengĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thengĂŠlyasha|thengĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothengĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gothengĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothengĂŠlnkrosha|gothengĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothengĂŠlnkmusha|gothengĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothengĂŠlnkyasha|gothengĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thongfalasha|thongfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongfalshĂ«sha|thongfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongfalrosha|thongfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongfalmusha|thongfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongfalyasha|thongfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongfalnkshĂ«sha|gothongfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongfalnkrosha|gothongfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongfalnkmusha|gothongfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongfalnkyasha|gothongfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
